goal: FND-001-A supported static keyword descriptor parity evidence

factoryBoundaryPatterns.pattern: does not have a static keyword factory descriptor mapping

requiredTests: CardEffectFactory Blocker static effect maps to keyword descriptor
CardEffectFactory keyword static effect rejects unsupported keyword shape
CardEffectFactory static keyword wrappers map supported keywords
Continuous static keyword condition gates keyword
Continuous static keyword field source grants Blocker
Continuous static keyword inherited source stops after move

keywordBoundary.reason: Only Blocker, Rush, Reboot, Collision, and Jamming are source-mapped to ContinuousKeywordDescriptor static wrappers here. Trigger/process keyword shapes such as Piercing, Retaliation, Alliance, Vortex, Scapegoat, Iceclad, and Progress remain source-mapping/remediation work and must not be inferred from CS-06.

items: Treat CardEffectFactory static keyword wrappers as ReuseCandidate only after TRUST-001 maps them to original KeyWordEffects files and CardEffects classes.
Keep Jamming mapped through CanNotBeDestroyedByBattleClass rather than a guessed JammingClass.
Do not reuse CS-06 evidence for unsupported trigger/process keyword shapes owned by FND001-CS-07.
Full-card parity remains NotRun until PARITY-001 creates executable Unity/RL comparison reports.
